narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
narratives.reasoning: This quote criticizes Western countries, specifically the US, for attempting to pressure India into aligning with their position on the Ukraine war, portraying their diplomatic efforts as coercive and self-serving.

narratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका किस तरह खालिस्तानी अतिवादियों और आतंकवादियों को जान-बूझकर संरक्षण देने में लगा हुआ है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement directly accuses the United States of knowingly sheltering and protecting Khalistani extremists and terrorists, which is a severe criticism of Western (specifically US) foreign policy and actions, framing them as malicious or hypocritical.

narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश भारत से मैत्री संबंधों को मधुर करने का गाना भी गाने में लगे हुए हैं और भारतीय हितों की रक्षा करना तो दूर, उनकी चिंता करने से भी इन्कार कर रहे हैं।
narratives.reasoning: This quote discredits Western countries by accusing them of hypocrisy—singing about friendly relations while refusing to protect or even consider India's interests, suggesting their diplomacy is insincere and ineffective.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: दुर्भाग्य से पश्चिमी देश यह समझने के लिए तैयार नहीं है कि यूके्रन के मामले में रूस की जायज चिंताओं की अनदेखी कर उन्होंने उसे चीन की गोद में बैठाने का काम किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement shifts blame for the conflict and its geopolitical consequences away from Russia (the invader) by asserting that the West ignored Russia's 'legitimate concerns' regarding Ukraine, thereby pushing Russia into China's embrace. It implies the West is responsible for the negative outcome.

narratives.evidence_quote: भारत इसकी अनदेखी नहीं कर सकता कि रूस ने सदैव संकट के समय उसकी सहायता की है।
narratives.reasoning: This is a positive statement highlighting Russia's past supportive actions towards India, portraying Russia as a reliable and helpful partner, which aligns with the narrative of praising Russia's character and policies.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Western efforts to get India on their side regarding the Ukraine war as a self-serving attempt to make India echo their narrative, implying the West's primary concern is advancing its own geopolitical bloc interests rather than genuinely caring about Ukraine's fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work

subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discredits Western diplomatic strategy by claiming it is fundamentally flawed, as it ignores Russia's 'legitimate concerns' and has pushed Russia closer to China, suggesting the West's approach is counterproductive and ineffective.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy by portraying the West as hypocritical and unreliable partners who sing of friendship with India but actively refuse to protect or even consider India's core interests, particularly regarding Khalistani extremists.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Western efforts to bring India to their side as a self-serving geopolitical maneuver, implying their primary concern is not Ukraine's fate but rallying support against Russia for their own bloc's interests.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is overreacting
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस पर हैरानी नहीं कि प्रधानमंत्री मोदी की मास्को में रूसी राष्ट्रपति व्लादिमिर पुतिन के साथ गर्मजोशी भरी मुलाकात से पश्चिमी देश जल-भुन-से गए हैं। अमेरिका ने भारतीय प्रधानमंत्री की रूस यात्रा पर चिंता व्यक्त की तो यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति बिना सोचे-समझे भारतीय प्रधानमंत्री पर हमलावर हो गए।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text describes Western and Ukrainian reactions to Modi's visit as excessive ('jolted', 'expressed concern', 'attacked without thinking'), portraying them as disproportionate and emotional rather than measured diplomatic responses.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश भारत से मैत्री संबंधों को मधुर करने का गाना भी गाने में लगे हुए हैं और भारतीय हितों की रक्षा करना तो दूर, उनकी चिंता करने से भी इन्कार कर रहे हैं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively discredits Western diplomacy by accusing Western nations of hypocrisy—singing praises of friendship with India while simultaneously refusing to address India's core security concerns (like harboring Khalistani extremists). It supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: The West are the aggressors
subnarratives.evidence_quote: दुर्भाग्य से पश्चिमी देश यह समझने के लिए तैयार नहीं है कि यूके्रन के मामले में रूस की जायज चिंताओं की अनदेखी कर उन्होंने उसे चीन की गोद में बैठाने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly shifts responsibility for the conflict's escalation and Russia's actions onto the West, claiming the West ignored Russia's 'legitimate concerns' and pushed Russia towards China, thereby framing the West as the provocateur.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative by portraying the West (specifically the US) as actively trying to manipulate and coerce India into their camp regarding the war, implying the West is a driving force in the conflict's dynamics and seeking to expand its influence, which is a form of blaming external actors for the war's continuation and polarization.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia is a guarantor of peace and prosperity
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भारत इसकी अनदेखी नहीं कर सकता कि रूस ने सदैव संकट के समय उसकी सहायता की है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote portrays Russia as a reliable and supportive partner to India during times of crisis, aligning with the narrative that Russia provides stability and positive outcomes (prosperity/security) to those who cooperate with it.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसने इस बात पर प्रसन्नता व्यक्त की कि प्रधानमंत्री मोदी ने यह दिखा दिया कि वे अमेरिका के प्रयासों के बावजूद रूस से दूरी बनाने के लिए तैयार नहीं
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote, referencing China's positive reaction to Modi's visit, implicitly frames India's continued engagement with Russia as a form of international support for Russia, countering Western isolation efforts.
